text.title: Trade-off Stakeholder Communication Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the 4-artefact stakeholder briefing bundle. Validator enforces shared risk paragraph + per-role required fields.

example.note: decision_id pattern fails; key_risk too vague; exec_summary omits the trade; engineer_note.sacrificed empty (violates no-hidden-sacrifice); no embeds_key_risk true anywhere.

list.item: key_risk paragraph missing from any of the four artefacts.
Identical body text across two or more artefacts (role-fit violation).
convergence_check_passed false for a type-1 decision.
